transcript: i keep getting these flashbacks it's just they're not my own but i keep seeing they're not mine i've never seen. I just want what's ever going on to stop. These flashbacks you've been having, have you tried anything to get rid of them? Yeah, I tried to meditate and just calm down. I ended up just getting more visions, though. Look, I'm sorry this is happening to you, but I only came in here to get some flashcards. Oh, yeah, I'm sorry. It's in my junk drawer, just right there. Be warned, I haven't looked in there in ages why do you have this I swear I've never seen that before Ingrid this is serious I swear I haven't seen that before don't lie to me Victoria, I swear, I haven't seen that before. Don't lie to me. Victoria, I swear, I am not lying to you. Ingrid! Stop it! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! You're awake. I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I killed those people. I hurt you. Hello, it's Tabitha Van Houten with your weekly news. Ingrid Dawson has been arrested and accounted for 50 of the 123 murders in our state this year. And will be going on trial on March 3rd. In other news, the new viral song, I Will Never Be Alone Again, has reached 8 million views. Terima kasih telah menonton Thank you so much for watching, and I'll see you in the next video.
